libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For JDK 25 native-image runs, configure the generated test project/nativeTest run to pass -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true before Vert.x/Netty initializes. Use a local 127.0.0.1 Vert.x HttpServer for WebClient coverage; no external service or Docker image is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient is part of the artifact but depends on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; baseline meaningful WebClient coverage does not require it, but tests that specifically exercise OAuth2 APIs would need that extra dependency.
The system-property need is tied to Java 25/Netty 4.2.x native runs; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core with Netty 4.2.2.Final; on JDK 25 native runs Netty needs explicit Unsafe/reflection system properties before reliable coverage is reachable.
